use_cases: Toggle visibility of expanded content sections on documentation pages
Show/hide additional product details on e-commerce listings
Collapse and expand long-form article excerpts or summaries
Control visibility of FAQ items or nested content hierarchies
Toggle detailed descriptions in profile or portfolio pages
ai_summary: A minimalist toggle button component that controls content expansion and collapse. Features an animated chevron icon that rotates 180 degrees on state change to visually indicate the current expanded/collapsed state. Designed as a reusable atomic component for controlling visibility of truncated or hidden content sections across various platform contexts.
